content:
Setup and Configuration Timeline
Our onboarding process is extremely streamlined. A new organization can be fully registered and configured in less than 30 minutes, and the entire system can be fully functional with all policies active in 1 to 3 business days.

Bulk Employee Importing
HR administrators can easily import their entire employee directory in bulk using our pre-formatted Excel or CSV templates available in the Employees dashboard. You can upload names, emails, employee IDs, departments, and supervisor linkages in a single upload.

Hierarchy and Role Setup
The system supports multiple user types out of the box, including Super Admins, Organization Admins, HR managers, supervisors, and employees. Define reporting lines and approval workflows easily.

Hardware and Device Requirements
MANO-Attendance is fully web-based and cloud-native. It runs perfectly on any modern web browser such as Google Chrome, Apple Safari, Microsoft Edge, or Mozilla Firefox. There is no need for proprietary biometric hardware. Standard laptop webcams or smartphone cameras are used for facial camera verification, and standard device GPS sensors are utilized for geofencing.

section_heading: How to Purchase, Trials & Billing Cycles
content:
How to Purchase & Sales Channels
To purchase a plan, you can click on "Start Free Trial" or "Book a Demo" directly on the showcase landing page. Alternatively, you can email our business desk at sales@manoattendance.com or business@mano.co.in to get a custom quote and payment link.

14-Day Risk-Free Trial
We offer a 14-day fully featured free trial of our Starter and Growth plans. No credit card is required to sign up or start tracking attendance during the trial.

Payment Options
We process all payments securely through our integrated Razorpay payment gateway. We accept all major Credit Cards, Debit Cards, Net Banking, UPI, and direct Corporate Bank Transfers (NEFT/RTGS).

Billing Cycles and Discounts
Subscriptions are available on both Monthly and Annual billing cycles. Choosing an annual plan gets you an automatic 15% discount on the total subscription price.

Cancellation and Refund Policies
You can cancel your subscription at any time from your billing dashboard. If you cancel, your account remains active until the end of the billing period. For annual plans, we offer a prorated refund if requested within the first 30 days of subscription.

Starter Plan Details
The Starter Plan is best for small teams of up to 20 employees who need essential attendance operations. It includes:
- One-click attendance logging (Time In & Time Out)
- Basic leave application and balances
- Standard weekly attendance logs and reports
- Standard onboarding email support

Growth Plan Details
The Growth Plan is recommended for growing organizations with 20 to 150 employees who require advanced geofencing and active dashboard tracking. It includes:
- All Starter plan features
- Precision geofencing for dynamic site locations
- Manager dashboard showing live activity feeds
- Attendance correction and missed-punch request workflows
- Enhanced role controls and analytics dashboard

Enterprise Plan Details
The Enterprise Plan is designed for large companies (150+ employees) or multi-location/multi-site operations. It includes:
- All Growth plan features
- Custom shift roster and advanced flexible policies
- Multi-location geofencing and client-site authorization
- Priority SLA-backed support with custom API integrations
- Dedicated onboarding account manager and customized setup assistance

AWS Cloud Hosting and Security
All client data is hosted on secure Amazon Web Services (AWS) cloud servers with end-to-end TLS/HTTPS encryption. We maintain strict security compliance so that employee records remain fully isolated and protected.

GDPR and Data Privacy
We are fully GDPR compliant. Employee names, email addresses, and camera logs are protected. We use advanced hash-based storage for passwords, and facial verification images are processed locally and discarded or stored securely per privacy requirements.

Automated Redundant Backups
We run automated daily database backups across multiple secure locations. Our system boasts a historical 99.9% uptime SLA, guaranteeing your workforce logs are always accessible.

section_heading: Customer SLA, Office Hours & Tech Support
content:
Product Support Channels
For technical questions and help with setup, you can email our support team at support@manoattendance.com. Our support desk operates with a standard response turnaround of under 24 hours.

LIVE Office Hours
Our customer success team is available for live calls and chats during the following times:
- Monday to Friday: 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM
- Saturday: 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed

Enterprise Priority SLA
Enterprise subscribers receive premium SLA-backed priority support. Critical cases and high-priority system bugs are guaranteed to have a response and active resolution updates in under 4 hours.

HR Administrative Time Savings
By automating leave balances, shift calculations, grace periods, and correction requests, MANO-Attendance saves HR departments up to 2 to 4 hours of tedious administrative work per week.

Elimination of Buddy Punching
With 99.9% accurate facial webcam verification and strict GPS geofencing, employers eliminate buddy punching and proxy attendance entirely, preventing up to 5% in payroll leakage.

Autonomous Shift Policy Builder
Unlike competitors who require manual shift forms, our Prompts-to-Policy AI engine lets managers generate compliant shift policies instantly from simple natural language sentences, dramatically accelerating setup times.

Product Highlights

Shift Timings and Policy Rules
MANO-Attendance features a deeply granular Rule and Policy Engine. Unlike generic systems, HR administrators can configure specific shift timings, late arrival grace periods, alternate Saturday working rules, and overtime thresholds without writing custom code.
- Late Grace Period: Define specific grace periods, such as a strict 15-minute late arrival buffer, before latching a late-mark.
- Custom Shifts: Separate and assign custom start and end buffers per shift.
- Alternate Saturday Calculations: Built-in calendar logic to handle complex work rotations (e.g. alternate Saturday working rules).
- Overtime Rules: Define overtime activation thresholds automatically matched to daily payable hours.
- Cron-based Policy Engine: Rules are processed automatically in the background by a Cron Processor to instantly flag infractions or generate warnings.

Anti-Proxy Webcam Clock-In Verification
To eliminate proxy attendance and buddy punching, MANO-Attendance requires anti-proxy webcam verification:
- Moment-of-Clock-In Capture: The system requires a live photo capture from the user's laptop webcam or mobile device camera at the instant of check-in and check-out.
- Photo Audit Trails: Every photo is linked securely and directly to the corresponding attendance log.
- Dispute Resolution: HR and managers can review visual evidence directly inside the attendance logs to resolve disputes and verify identities instantly.

Geofencing Location Tracking
Our system uses precise location intelligence to restrict clock-ins to authorized work boundaries:
- 100-Meter Allowed Radius: Admins can draw virtual boundaries around office sites or client locations, enforcing a strict radius (e.g., 100 meters) for clock-in compliance.
- Live GPS Validation: Verifies real-time GPS coordinates when employees time in.
- Address Resolution: Leverages Google Maps API integration to translate raw GPS coordinates into human-readable physical addresses.
- Out of Bounds Flagging: Clock-ins attempted outside the geofence boundary are blocked or immediately flagged for manager review.

Missed Punch Correction Workflows
Mistakes happen, which is why MANO-Attendance provides formal self-service correction request workflows:
- Missed Clock-Out Resolution: Employees can submit time correction requests for missing punches.
- Mandatory Reason Codes: Requests require formal explanation text and reason codes to maintain accountability.
- Automatic Routing: Corrections are automatically routed to direct managers for single-click approvals.
- Manual Admin Overrides: Admins retain global manual override rights.
- Immutable Audit Logging: Tracks who requested a correction, who approved it, and when, for complete tax and audit readiness.

Structured daily Activity Logs
Keep teams transparent and productive with Daily Activity Reports (DAR):
- Task and Project Logging: Employees log specific tasks and hours spent per project during their shifts.
- Manager Comment Workflows: Supervisors can review, comment on, and approve daily task logs.
- Daily Workforce Snapshots: Shift summaries color-code team present, absent, on leave, or late ratios.
- Trend Archival: Historic daily activity reports are archived for annual performance reviews.

Secure Directory Governance
Our platform prioritizes enterprise-grade security and strict data privacy:
- Role-Based Access Control (RBAC): Differentiates views and controls for Super Admins, Organization Admins, HR Managers, supervisors, and employees.
- Encrypted storage: Secure file upload for employee profiles and documents hosted on AWS S3 buckets.
- Platform Security: Uses JWT-based authorization tokens, bcrypt password encryption, Helmet-secured API headers, and strict rate-limiting.

Matrix Attendance and Exports
Aggregate hours automatically for finance teams without manual data scrubbing:
- Visual Matrix Charts: View daily, weekly, and monthly attendance matrix graphs (powered by Recharts and Chart.js).
- Payable Hours Calculations: Calculates total payable hours, subtracting unpaid breaks and factoring in late grace minutes.
- Multi-format Exports: Instantly export reports to machine-readable Excel spreadsheets (.xlsx) or print-ready PDF summaries.

Workflow Alerts & Communication
Automate workflow handoffs with multi-channel push alerts:
- Socket.io Push: Live in-app alerts notify employees immediately when leaves or corrections are approved.
- Superior Alerts: Instant leave request notification pings to managers.
- Missed Clock-Out Alerts: Smart alerts warn users if they forget to check out.
- Configurable Email Summaries: System logs can send structured email summaries.

Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Bot
Employees get immediate answers to internal queries via an in-app AI Copilot (Mano Copilot):
- Policy Indexing: Handbooks (leaves, geofencing, holidays) are stored in a secure vector database.
- Clickable Citations: Bot answers overlay hyperlinks pointing directly to company handbook sections.
- Personal Balance Checking: Fetches live personal balances (e.g. sick leaves remaining) and ticket statuses.

Weekly Team Theme Synthesizing
Bridge the gap between raw task lists and productivity:
- Weekly AI Theme Summaries: Generates executive syntheses explaining team achievements.
- Vague Entry Detection: AI identifies and flags vague entries (e.g. "did work" or "did testing"), prompting users to clarify.
- Morale and Anomaly alerts: Sentiment analysis flags team burnout and reporting irregularities.

Central Control Command
A premium executive dashboard for complete operational overview:
- Dark-Mode Glassmorphism Aesthetics: Modern, harmful-blue free, harmonious tailwind-grade palette.
- Curved Historical Trend Lines: Graphical visualization of attendance distributions.
- Multi-tier Navigation: Click directly into departmental summaries from macro-graphs.

Active Worker Monitoring
Watch your global organization pulse in real-time:
- Pulsing Session Indicators: Active checked-in worker badges pulse globally.
- Real-time GPS coordinate mapping: Roving or field staff locations plot directly on maps.
- Geofence Breach Exception: Immediate coordinates alert if geofences are bypassed.

Pricing Models Billed Monthly or Annually
MANO-Attendance offers tiered packages with a 15% discount for annual billing:
- Starter Plan ($0 / month): Best for small teams up to 20 employees. Covers Time In & Out tracking, basic leave balances, standard reports, and standard email support.
- Growth Plan ($29 / month): Recommended for 20-150 employees. Includes analytics dashboard, geofencing location tracking, correction workflows, and enhanced role permissions.
- Enterprise Plan ($99 / month): Designed for 150+ employees or multi-site teams. Includes custom shifts and rosters, custom API sync integrations, priority support with under-4-hour SLA response, and a dedicated onboarding success manager.
